coding.display: Renal function 2000 panel - Serum or Plasma

code.text: Renal function panel / chronic kidney disease monitoring labs

conclusion: Reviewed nephrology laboratory trend summary showed CKD stage 3b with creatinine 1.74 mg/dL, estimated glomerular filtration rate about 33 mL/min/1.73 m2, phosphorus 4.1 mg/dL, calcium 9.1 mg/dL, albumin 3.9 g/dL, hemoglobin 11.4 g/dL, and urine albumin-creatinine ratio 248 mg/g.
